scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,mobile -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm --prefix godam-mobile run start"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.dev:web:huawei: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "env HUAWEI_GODAM_STREAMLIT_AUTOSTART=1 npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
